channel.title: Medium on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Medium on Make Things Happen

item.title: Why am I unsubscribing from Medium as a tech info source?
item.description: I started writing on Medium in 2016 when I thought it made sense to share helpful info with other people on a platform to which everyone has access. This way you don’t need to promote your content; it is immediately available to everyone, as people say “under their fingertips”.
